title: convolvulus prostratus var. boissieri
intro: Convolvulus prostratus var. boissieri, also known as the dwarf morning glory, is a type of flowering plant in the Convolvulaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Convolvulus prostratus var. boissieri include infusion, decoction, and tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
